nodes.label: Gary McKinnon
nodes.summary: British hacker; hacked US Army, Navy, Air Force, DoD, and NASA in 2001-2002 while seeking UFO evidence; faced 70-year US extradition threat (still on pole red list). Autistic; discovered photos of non-terrestrial craft and spreadsheets of 'non-terrestrial officers'.

sources.quote: British hacker of 'biggest military computer hack of all time'

nodes.label: Non-Terrestrial Officers (NASA spreadsheet)
nodes.summary: Spreadsheet title discovered by Gary McKinnon on US DoD / NASA servers; listed names and ranks of purported 'non-terrestrial officers' — i.e., personnel whose assignment was not on Earth.

sources.timestamp_end: Spreadsheet found on US military servers titled 'non-terrestrial officers'

nodes.label: Gary McKinnon US DoD/NASA Hack
nodes.summary: 2001-2002 penetration of US DoD, Army, Navy, Air Force, and NASA computer systems from McKinnon's UK bedroom over dial-up — Pentagon's own description: 'the biggest military computer hack of all time.'

sources.timestamp_end: 2001-2002 lone hacker infiltration of US military networks

nodes.label: While downloading a slow image file at 4 AM McKinnon witnessed on his screen a black-space hemispher
nodes.summary: While downloading a slow image file at 4 AM McKinnon witnessed on his screen a black-space hemisphere (a planet) with a silvery cigar-shaped object alongside — mid-image, someone remote-connected and cut him off.

sources.quote: Slowly a hemisphere started appearing and I'm thinking that's a planet. What the hell? And then suddenly there's a big straight kind of silvery line, cigar-shaped object. I see the mouse move and someone else is at the computer themselves. They right clicked, disconnect, and boom, that was it.

type_specific.statement_text: While downloading a slow image file at 4 AM McKinnon witnessed on his screen a black-space hemisphere (a planet) with a silvery cigar-shaped object alongside — mid-image, someone remote-connected and cut him off.

nodes.label: McKinnon found a spreadsheet titled 'non-terrestrial officers' — purporting to list names and ranks
nodes.summary: McKinnon found a spreadsheet titled 'non-terrestrial officers' — purporting to list names and ranks of personnel not on Earth.

sources.quote: This spreadsheet was titled non-terrestrial officers, so not on the Earth. And that was incredible.

type_specific.statement_text: McKinnon found a spreadsheet titled 'non-terrestrial officers' — purporting to list names and ranks of personnel not on Earth.

nodes.label: The US sought to extradite McKinnon for prosecution carrying up to 70 years prison; UK refused extra
nodes.summary: The US sought to extradite McKinnon for prosecution carrying up to 70 years prison; UK refused extradition. McKinnon remains on the Interpol 'red list' — cannot enter the US.

sources.quote: They wanted to put you in prison for 70 years. I'm on the Interpol red list.

type_specific.statement_text: The US sought to extradite McKinnon for prosecution carrying up to 70 years prison; UK refused extradition. McKinnon remains on the Interpol 'red list' — cannot enter the US.

nodes.label: After the hacking period, McKinnon was woken by sharp pain — found two perfectly circular holes in h
nodes.summary: After the hacking period, McKinnon was woken by sharp pain — found two perfectly circular holes in his left heel — an unexplained physical mark he attributes to the same class of phenomenon he was investigating.

sources.quote: I was suddenly woken up by a really sharp pain that immediately I just went in my left heel. There were two perfectly circular holes.

type_specific.statement_text: After the hacking period, McKinnon was woken by sharp pain — found two perfectly circular holes in his left heel — an unexplained physical mark he attributes to the same class of phenomenon he was investigating.

nodes.label: McKinnon infiltrated the US DoD/NASA with nothing more than a 56K dial-up connection from his bedroo
nodes.summary: McKinnon infiltrated the US DoD/NASA with nothing more than a 56K dial-up connection from his bedroom in a dressing gown at 4 AM — 'normal guy interested in UFOs with some IT skills.'

sources.quote: I was in my dressing gown up till like 4 in the morning, smoking weed, drinking beer. I was on a 56k dialup. Nothing genius level.

type_specific.statement_text: McKinnon infiltrated the US DoD/NASA with nothing more than a 56K dial-up connection from his bedroom in a dressing gown at 4 AM — 'normal guy interested in UFOs with some IT skills.'

While downloading a slow image file at 4 AM McKinnon witnessed on his screen a black-space hemisphere (a planet) with a silvery cigar-shaped object alongside — mid-image, someone remote-connected and
McKinnon found a spreadsheet titled 'non-terrestrial officers' — purporting to list names and ranks of personnel not on Earth.
The US sought to extradite McKinnon for prosecution carrying up to 70 years prison; UK refused extradition. McKinnon remains on the Interpol 'red list' — cannot enter the US.
